title: Schedule Send for Updates
excerpt: Suggestion: Schedule Send options for updates! PLEASE!

posts.author: anniott (Ann Iott)
posts.cookedHtml: Suggestion: Schedule Send options for updates! PLEASE!

posts.author: Aedrei (aedrei)
posts.cookedHtml: Oh my gosh yes. I don’t want to notify my teammates if I’m working on a project late at night or early in the morning-- it’s just common courtesy.

posts.author: greg-hrc (Greg Collette)
posts.cookedHtml: Great idea! This would help promote both flexibility and work-life balance for employees.

posts.author: anniott (Ann Iott)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! Why isn’t this a thing yet?! I hate to bother people but I am prone to forgetting and like to take care of things in the moment.
